subject: logic
title: What's the Connection?
question: I'm going to give you three short analogies. For each one, fill in the missing word - then explain the relationship as clearly as you can.
modelReasoningPath: What to listen for: The first two analogies are warm-up. The third is where the real thinking happens - the relationship is more abstract (representation vs. reality) and requires the child to go beyond simply "completing a pattern." A child who articulates "a recipe tells you how to make a meal but isn't the meal" has understood something genuinely interesting about the nature of language and symbols. ---
